summary: Frontend-only validation completed for large embedded Instagram chat timeline (24.7k messages). Progressive rendering, global search, match navigation, highlight, jump-to-latest, and desktop/mobile responsiveness are working.

issues: Bottom-right environment floating badge overlaps footer note text area in small viewport.

action_items: Add/adjust mobile safe-area spacing so footer note remains fully readable when environment badge is present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on public URL with real embedded files: range indicator shows 500/24.7k (progressive rendering), DOM mounted rows=500, search works across full history (e.g., 'proscrastination' -> 1/1, 'okay' -> 1/209), next/prev updates highlighted bubble, jump-to-latest appears after scroll-up and returns to bottom (distance=0 after animation), mobile sidebar open/close works with prefixed test ids.
rca of the issue: Design overlap is caused by external fixed bottom-right environment badge while chat footer does not reserve additional right/bottom safe space on mobile.
